frozen_protocol.root_state_source: stored factual path replayed in official core
frozen_protocol.second_actions: all official branch admissible actions; evaluator only
frozen_protocol.self_routing: predicted first room/done push/pop/hold or stop

sg16_protocol.planner_tie_break: sum channel top1-top2 margins, then lexical action
sg16_protocol.state_reconciliation: real observation room stack: novel push, prior rollback, same/no-room hold

label_sources.move_exit_count_after: counterfactual admissible_actions_after or next factual step
label_sources.room_relation: normalized next_obs room vs current/prior rooms

audit.task: multichannel action-conditioned real TextWorld event delta

experiment: E3-SG17 two-step official branch rollout composition

research_hypothesis.epistemic_status: rollout mechanism on already observed fifth games
research_hypothesis.statement: Strict phase spike memory composes its own first delta into a second transition without BPTT or attention history.
research_hypothesis.what_if: What if local spike-state composition is the minimal real-time unit of world-model thought?

training.factorization: block Cholesky update of each Schur complement
